issues.title: spring-ai-openai-spring-boot-starter only up to version 1.0.0-M6?
issues.body: spring-ai official website already shows the version 1.0.0-RC1

comments.body:
From M6 to M7 there were artifact id changes for the model starters:

spring-ai-{model}-spring-boot-starter → spring-ai-starter-model-{model}

Try this instead

```
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
  <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-model-openai</artifactId>
</dependency>
```
